Certificate.title: Certificate
Certificate.description: A medical certificate generated for a patient.

uid.description: The user ID of the doctor who generated the certificate.

doctorName.description: The name of the doctor signing the certificate.

patientFirstName.description: The first name of the patient.

patientLastName.description: The last name of the patient.

patientDob.description: The date of birth of the patient.

eds.description: The EDS number of the patient.

startDate.description: The start date of the absence.

endDate.description: The end date of the absence.

doctorTitle.description: The title of the doctor (e.g., Docteur, Docteure).

doctorRole.description: The role of the doctor (e.g., interne, associé).

patientGender.description: The gender of the patient (e.g., né, née).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the certificate was created.

Template.title: Template
Template.description: A Word document template for certificates.

name.description: The name of the template file.

data.description: The base64 encoded content of the template.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the template was last updated.

certificates/{certificateId}.description: Stores medical certificates generated by doctors.

templates/{templateId}.description: Stores global Word templates for certificates.
